let statusFuentes = view() {
    let startQuery = bin($__timeFrom, 1m);
    let endQuery = bin($__timeTo, 1m);
    let mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01": "job01_meteo",
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02": "job02_meteo",
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01": "job01_pisystem",
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job02": "job02_pisystem",
            "mlp-prd-caj-plans-job01": "job01_plans",
            "DISPATCH": "ADF_dispatch_ingestion",
            "DRILLIT": "ADF_drillit_ingestion",
            "BLOCKGRADE": "ADF_blockgrade_ingestion",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17": "job17_nrt_dispatch",
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job01": "job01_settings",
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job02": "job02_settings"
        });
    let mapUmbralAlerta = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01": 35,
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02": 35,
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01": 25,
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job02": 25,
            "mlp-prd-caj-plans-job01": 25,
            "DISPATCH": 35,
            "DRILLIT": 35,
            "BLOCKGRADE": 60,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17":10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job01": 60,
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job02": 120
        });
    let umbralDataset =
        range dummy from 1 to 1 step 1
        | extend values = mapUmbralAlerta
        | mv-expand values
        | extend value = todouble(replace_string(tostring(split(values, ":")[1]), "}", ""))
        | sort by value desc
        | project value
        | take 1;
    let maxUmbral = toscalar(umbralDataset);
    let get_container_sources_data = view() { 
    let bins_expected_logs = view() { 
        range TimeGeneratedBin_Chile from startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) to endQuery step 1m
        | extend TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = bin(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, 1m)
        | extend ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) % 15 == 0, 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 16, 31, 46), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01"] = 1,
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 11, 21, 31, 41, 51), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-plans-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) == 46 and datetime_part("hour", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0,1,6,13,17,18,19),1, 0),
                ["expected_DISPATCH"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (6, 16, 26, 36, 46, 56), 1, 0),
                ["expected_DRILLIT"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 11, 21, 31, 41, 51), 1, 0),
                ["expected_BLOCKGRADE"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (2,32), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) % 2 == 0, 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) == 0 and datetime_part("hour", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (12,18), 1, 0)
        | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, allValues=pack_all()
        | mv-expand allValues
        | extend nombreEsperado = tostring(bag_keys(allValues)[0])
        | extend valorEsperado = toint(allValues[nombreEsperado])
        | project-away allValues
        | where nombreEsperado startswith "expected_"
    };
    let bins_real_data = view() {
        let Filtered_ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL = view() { 
            ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
            | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery and JobName_s startswith "mlp-prd-"
            | where Log_s contains "has successfully completed"// or Log_s contains "has exited with status Failed"
            | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal = JobName_s, valorReal = 1
        };
    let Filtered_PipelineRuns = view() {
    AzureDiagnostics
        | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery
        | where Category == "PipelineRuns" 
        | where OperationName in ("PL_FULL - Succeeded", "PL_BLOCKGRADE - Succeeded")
        | extend nombreReal = iff(ResourceGroup == "MLP-PRD-RG-BLKGRDE", "BLOCKGRADE", replace_string(ResourceGroup, "MLP-PRD-RG-", ""))
        | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal, valorReal = 1
    };
     let Filtered_Job17_Realtime = view() {
        ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery
        | where JobName_s == "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"
        | where Log_s contains "has successfully completed"
        | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal = "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17", valorReal = 1
    };
        let bins_union_data = view() { 
            union Filtered_ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL, Filtered_PipelineRuns
            | summarize valorReal = sum(valorReal) by nombreReal, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = bin(TimeGenerated, totimespan(1 * 60s))
            | project nombreReal, valorReal, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile
            | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile asc
            | extend nombreEsperado=strcat("expected_", nombreReal)
        };
        bins_union_data
    };
    let join_std_data = view() { 
        bins_expected_logs
        | join kind=leftouter (bins_real_data) on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreEsperado
        | project-away TimeGeneratedBin_Chile1, nombreEsperado1
        | extend nombreReal = replace_string(nombreEsperado, "expected_", "")
        | extend valorReal = coalesce(valorReal, 0)
    };
    join_std_data
    };
    let valoresAcumulados = view() {
        get_container_sources_data
            | extend ["umbralAlerta"] = mapUmbralAlerta[nombreReal]
            | extend range = range(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile + totimespan(todouble(umbralAlerta) * 60s), 1m)
            | mv-expand range to typeof(datetime)
            | summarize ["valorAccReal"]=sum(["valorReal"]),
                        ["valorAccEsperado"]=sum(["valorEsperado"])
                        by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile=range, ["nombreReal"]
            | where TimeGeneratedBin_Chile < endQuery
            | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc
            | extend ["status"] = iff(["valorAccReal"] == 0 and ["valorAccEsperado"] != 0, "a", "-")
    };
    let result = view() { 
        get_container_sources_data
            | join kind=leftouter valoresAcumulados on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal
            | summarize ["status"]=iff(countif(["status"] == "a") > 0, "a", "-"),
                        ["valorReal"] = sum(["valorReal"]),
                        ["valorEsperado"] = sum(["valorEsperado"]),
                        ["nombreEsperado"] = take_any(["nombreEsperado"])
                by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile=bin(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, totimespan(15 * 60s)), ["nombreReal"]
            // Formato ejecuciones_correctas/ejecuciones_totales. ej: 0/1
            | extend ["status"] = case(
                                    // ["valorEsperado"] == 0, "n",
                                    ["status"] == "a", "a",
                                    ["valorReal"] > ["valorEsperado"], "s",
                                    ["valorReal"] < ceiling(0.85*["valorEsperado"]), "w",
                                    "n")
            | extend ["status"] = strcat(["status"], ["valorReal"], "/", ["valorEsperado"])
            | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal, status
            | where TimeGeneratedBin_Chile >= startQuery and TimeGeneratedBin_Chile < endQuery
            | extend nombreReal = tostring(mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor[nombreReal])
            | evaluate pivot(nombreReal, take_any(status), TimeGeneratedBin_Chile)
    };
    result
      | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, job01_meteo, job02_meteo, job01_pisystem, job02_pisystem, job01_plans, ADF_dispatch_ingestion, ADF_drillit_ingestion, ADF_blockgrade_ingestion , job17_nrt_dispatch, job01_settings, job02_settings
};
// ######################## ULTIMA ACTUALIZACION FUENTES ####################################
let ultimaActualizacionFuentes = view() {
  let mapUmbralAlerta = dynamic(
    {
      "pisystem_interpolated": 20,
      "pisystem_recorded": 2460,
      "dispatch_tiempos": 60,
      "dispatch_shiftdumps": 60,
      "dispatch_shiftloads": 60,
      "dispatch_shiftloads2": 60,
      "dispatch_shiftstate": 60,
      "drillit_drillings": 600,
      "drillit_drill_state_history": 600,
      "meteodata": 180,
      "blockgrade_bybucket": 90,
      "planes_semanales_AXB": 1440, //no se ocupa
      "planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU": 1440,
      "planes_semanales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU": 1440,
      "planes_semanales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG":1440,
      "planes_semanales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO":1440,
      "planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU":1440,
      "planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO":1440,
      "planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO":1440,
      "planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO":1440,
      "planes_semanales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE":1440,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_AXB":2100, //no se ocupa
      "planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_CH":2100, //no se ocupa
      "planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_BOTADERO":2100, //no se ocupa
      "planes_acc_mensuales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_EXTRACCION_MINA":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO":2100,
      "planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU":2100,
      "planes_mensuales":2100, //no se ocupa
      "plan_diario":2100, //no se ocupa
      "StdShiftLoads2": 10,
      "stdshiftdumpsnodicavel": 10,
      "StdShiftDumps": 10,
      "StdShiftLoads": 10,
      "tiempos_mlp": 10,
      "StdShiftState": 10,
      "ShiftInfo": 10,
      "SHIFTShiftLoad": 10,
      "StdGrade": 10
    }
    );
  ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
      | where TimeGenerated >= bin($__timeFrom, 1m) 
      | where TimeGenerated < bin($__timeTo, 1m)
      | where ContainerGroupName_s startswith "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job02"
      | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha'
      | project TimeGenerated, parsed = parse_json(Log_s)
      | project TimeGenerated,
                mensaje = parsed.mensaje,
                fecha_log_UTC = todatetime(parsed.fecha_log_UTC)
      | where mensaje startswith "timestamp_"
      | extend ultimo_timestamp_str = substring(mensaje, indexof(mensaje, ": ") + 2, 19)
      | extend ultimo_timestamp = todatetime(ultimo_timestamp_str)
      | extend tabla = replace_string(
                          replace_string(
                              substring(mensaje, 10, indexof(mensaje, ": ") - 10),
                              "last_record_", ""
                          ),
                          "last_reg_", ""
                      )
      | extend ultimo_timestamp = datetime_local_to_utc(ultimo_timestamp, "America/Santiago")
      | extend diff_minutos = round(datetime_diff("second", fecha_log_UTC, ultimo_timestamp) / 60.0, 1)
      | extend hora_actual = datetime_part("hour", now())
      | extend umbralAlertaOriginal = mapUmbralAlerta[tabla]
      | extend umbralAlerta = case(
            tabla in ("planes_mensuales", "plan_diario") and hora_actual < 10,
            umbralAlertaOriginal + 180,
            umbralAlertaOriginal
        )
      | extend Alertar = iff(diff_minutos > umbralAlerta or isempty(diff_minutos), true, false)
      | project TimeGenerated, tabla, diff_minutos, Alertar
}; 
// -------------------------
// BLOQUE NRT
// -------------------------
let datos_nrt =
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= bin($__timeFrom, 1m)
          and TimeGenerated < bin($__timeTo, 1m)
        | where ContainerGroupName_s contains "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"
        | where Log_s contains "Diff sql query"
        | extend tabla = extract(@"Diff sql query\s+([\w\.]+):", 1, Log_s)
        | extend tabla = tostring(split(tabla, ".")[-1])
        | extend segundos = extract(@"Diff sql query\s+[\w\.]+:\s+([0-9\.]+)\s+seconds", 1, Log_s)
        | extend diff_minutos = todouble(segundos) / 60.0
        | extend umbral_NRT = 6
        | extend Alertar = iff(diff_minutos > umbral_NRT, true, false)
        | project TimeGenerated, tabla, diff_minutos, Alertar;

let ultima_y_nrt = 
    union ultimaActualizacionFuentes, datos_nrt
    | summarize Max_DiffMinutos = max(diff_minutos),
                Alertar = max(Alertar)
        by tabla, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
    | evaluate pivot(tabla, take_any(Alertar), TimeGeneratedBin_Chile);
// ######################## JOBS ADA ####################################
let statusKpisAlarms = view() {
    let startQuery = bin($__timeFrom, 1m);
    let endQuery = bin($__timeTo, 1m);
    let mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job01": "job01_transporte_fluidos",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job02": "job02_indicadores_generales",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job03": "job03_indicadores_globales",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job04": "job04_stock_chacay",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job05": "job05_servicios_mina",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job06": "job06_alarms-operational-parameters",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07": "job07_alarms-service",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job08": "job08_chancado",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job09": "job09_carguio",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job10": "job10_flotacion",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job11": "job11_molienda",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job12": "job12_puerto",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job13": "job13_transporte",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job14": "job14_desaladora",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17": "job17_data_dispatch"
        });
    let mapUmbralAlerta = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job01": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job02": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job03": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job04": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job05": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job06": 35,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07": 10, //updt 02/10
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job08": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job09": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job10": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job11": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job12": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job13": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job14": 10,
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17": 35
        });
    let umbralDataset =
        range dummy from 1 to 1 step 1
        | extend values = mapUmbralAlerta
        | mv-expand values
        | extend value = todouble(replace_string(tostring(split(values, ":")[1]), "}", ""))
        | sort by value desc
        | project value
        | take 1;
    let maxUmbral = toscalar(umbralDataset);
    let get_container_ada_data = view() { 
        let bins_expected_logs = view() { 
            range TimeGeneratedBin_Chile from startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) to endQuery step 1m
            | extend TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = bin(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, 1m)
            | extend ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job01"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job02"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job03"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job04"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job05"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job06"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), 1, 0),
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job08"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job09"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job10"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job11"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job12"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job13"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job14"] = 1,
                    ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0, 10, 20, 30, 40, 50), 1, 0)
            | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, allValues=pack_all()
                | mv-expand allValues
                | extend nombreEsperado = tostring(bag_keys(allValues)[0])
                | extend valorEsperado = toint(allValues[nombreEsperado])
                | project-away allValues
                | where nombreEsperado startswith "expected_"
        };
        let get_detalle_container_jobs = view() {
            let jobsFlexibles = dynamic(["mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"]);
            ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
                | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery
                | where JobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job'
                | where Reason_s == 'Completed' 
                | where Log_s contains "has successfully completed"
                | extend NormalizedTime = iff(JobName_s in (jobsFlexibles), 
                                 bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), // redondear a los 10m inferior
                                 bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)) // redondea al minuto inferior
                | extend valorReal = 1
                | summarize valorReal = sum(valorReal) by JobName_s, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = NormalizedTime
                | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal=JobName_s, valorReal
                | extend nombreEsperado=strcat("expected_", nombreReal)
        };
        let join_std_data = view() { 
            bins_expected_logs
            | join kind=leftouter (get_detalle_container_jobs) on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreEsperado
            | project-away TimeGeneratedBin_Chile1, nombreEsperado1
            | extend nombreReal = replace_string(nombreEsperado, "expected_", "")
            | extend valorReal = coalesce(valorReal, 0)
        };
        join_std_data
    };
    let valoresAcumulados = view() {
        get_container_ada_data
            | extend ["umbralAlerta"] = mapUmbralAlerta[nombreReal]
            | extend range = range(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile + totimespan(todouble(umbralAlerta) * 60s), 1m)
            | mv-expand range to typeof(datetime)
            | summarize ["valorAccReal"]=sum(["valorReal"]),
                        ["valorAccEsperado"]=sum(["valorEsperado"])
                        by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile=range, ["nombreReal"]
            | where TimeGeneratedBin_Chile < endQuery
            | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc
            | extend ["status"] = iff(["valorAccReal"] == 0 and ["valorAccEsperado"] != 0, "a", "-")
    };
    let result = view() { 
        get_container_ada_data
            | join kind=leftouter valoresAcumulados on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal
            | summarize ["status"]=iff(countif(["status"] == "a") > 0, "a", "-"),
                        ["valorReal"] = sum(["valorReal"]),
                        ["valorEsperado"] = sum(["valorEsperado"]),
                        ["nombreEsperado"] = take_any(["nombreEsperado"])
                by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile=bin(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, totimespan(15 * 60s)), ["nombreReal"]
            // Formato ejecuciones_correctas/ejecuciones_totales. ej: 0/1
            | extend ["status"] = case(
                                    // ["valorEsperado"] == 0, "n",
                                    ["status"] == "a", "a",
                                    ["valorReal"] > ["valorEsperado"], "s",
                                    ["valorReal"] < ceiling(0.85*["valorEsperado"]), "w",
                                    "n")
            | extend ["status"] = strcat(["status"], ["valorReal"], "/", ["valorEsperado"])
            | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal, status
            | where TimeGeneratedBin_Chile >= startQuery and TimeGeneratedBin_Chile < endQuery
            | extend nombreReal = tostring(mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor[nombreReal])
            | evaluate pivot(nombreReal, take_any(status), TimeGeneratedBin_Chile)
    };
    result
        | project ["TimeGeneratedBin_Chile"], ["job01_transporte_fluidos"], ["job02_indicadores_generales"], ["job03_indicadores_globales"], ["job04_stock_chacay"], ["job05_servicios_mina"], ["job06_alarms-operational-parameters"], ["job07_alarms-service"], ["job08_chancado"], ["job09_carguio"], ["job10_flotacion"], ["job11_molienda"], ["job12_puerto"], ["job13_transporte"], ["job14_desaladora"],["job17_data_dispatch"]
};
// ######################## Obtencion KPIs sin datos #################################
let get_detalle_kpis_sin_datos = (inicioFecha: datetime, finFecha: datetime)
{
    // Variables
    let CurrentTimeChile = datetime_utc_to_local(now(), 'America/Santiago');
    let CurrentTimeChileWeekDay = dayofweek(CurrentTimeChile) / 1d;
    let CurrentTimeChileHour = datetime_part("hour", CurrentTimeChile);
    let CurrentTimeChileMinute = datetime_part("minute", CurrentTimeChile);
    // 
    // Condiciones KPIs sin datos
    // KPIs que se espera que siempre esten sin datos
    let condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes = True;
    // KPIS sin datos de 7.00 a 10.00
    let condicion_2_0700_a_1000 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 7 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;
    // KPIS sin datos de 19.00 a 21.00
    let condicion_3_1900_a_2100 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 21;
    // KPIS sin datos de miercoles 19.00 a viernes 9.00 horas
    let condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100 = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 3 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19)
                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4)
                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 9);
    // Kpis Sin datos fuera de horario laboral
    let condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 6 or CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 7)
                                            or (CurrentTimeChileHour < 9)
                                            or (CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19);
    // Kpis Sin datos de jueves 21.00 a viernes 10.30 horas
    let condicion_6_jueves_2100_a_viernes_1030 = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21)
                                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour <= 8)
                                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour == 8 and CurrentTimeChileMinute < 30);

    // Kpis sin datos 9am:
    let condicion_7_0900_a_0930 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 9 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;

    // Kpis sin datos 9pm:
    let condicion_8_2100_a_2130 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 22;

    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= inicioFecha and TimeGenerated < finFecha
        | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job' and not(ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07')
        | project TimeGenerated, ContainerJobName_s, Log_s
        | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
        | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
        | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
        | where log_nivel == "ERROR"
        | extend root_error_line = tostring(split(traceback, "\n")[3])
        | extend kpi_name = replace_string(extract(", in (.+)$", 1, root_error_line), "get_", "")
         // Se filtran los nombres de los kpis que es esperado que esten sin datos.
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = tostring(["kpi_name"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_7_0900_a_0930, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in ("numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal","numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal","numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal","numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal","numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal","numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"),  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_8_2100_a_2130, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in ("numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal","numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal","numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal","numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal","numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal","numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"),  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "last_record_dispatch",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "alimentacion_chancado_plan",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "make_up_plan",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "tph_transporte_plan", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "metros_perforados_plan_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_real_acc_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "mo_fino_producido_real_acc_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "mo_fino_producido_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_producido_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_3_1900_a_2100, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "ton_stockpile_proyeccion", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "rendimiento_perforacion_plan_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "metros_perforados_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "numero_perforadoras_operando_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "numero_perforadoras_disponible_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "rendimiento_perforacion_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == " ", "", ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | where ["KPIs No esperados"] != ""
        | extend minutos_desde_error = round(datetime_diff('second', $__timeTo(), fecha_log_UTC) / 60.0, 2)
        | order by minutos_desde_error asc
        | summarize ["KPIs sin datos"] = make_set(kpi_name), ["KPIs No esperados"] = make_set(["KPIs No esperados"]), ["Count No esperados"] = dcount(["KPIs No esperados"]) by bin(fecha_log_UTC, 5m)
        | extend MinutosPasados = round(datetime_diff('second', $__timeTo(), fecha_log_UTC) / 60.0, 0)
        | project fecha_log_UTC, MinutosPasados, ["Count No esperados"], ["KPIs No esperados"], ["KPIs sin datos"]
        | order by fecha_log_UTC desc

};
let detalle_kpis_sin_datos = get_detalle_kpis_sin_datos(inicioFecha=$__timeTo - totimespan(10 * 60s), finFecha=$__timeTo);

// ######################## Alertas conocidas Front #################################
let AlertarFront = view() {
    AppServiceConsoleLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= $__timeTo - totimespan(10 * 60s) and TimeGenerated < $__timeTo
    | where Level == "Error" and ResultDescription contains "/usr/src/app/app/" or (ResultDescription contains "Invalid access token")
    | project TimeGenerated, Level, ResultDescription
    | order by TimeGenerated desc
};

let incidentes_largos_alarmas = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07'
    | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
    | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
    | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
    | where log_nivel == "ERROR" and log_capa == "domain-alarm"
    | extend fecha_log_UTC = todatetime(fecha_log_UTC)
    | sort by nombre_alarma asc, fecha_log_UTC asc
    | serialize 
    | extend prev_fecha = prev(fecha_log_UTC), prev_nombre = prev(nombre_alarma)
    | extend diferencia_segundos = iif(nombre_alarma == prev_nombre, datetime_diff('second', fecha_log_UTC, prev_fecha), 9999)
    | extend nuevo_bloque = iif(diferencia_segundos > 300, 1, 0) 
    | extend id_bloque = row_cumsum(nuevo_bloque)
    | summarize fin_incidente = max(fecha_log_UTC), inicio_incidente = min(fecha_log_UTC) by nombre_alarma, id_bloque
    | extend duracion_minutos = datetime_diff('minute', fin_incidente, inicio_incidente)
    | where duracion_minutos >= 60
    | count
);


// ######################## DETECCIÓN ERROR CONEXIÓN STORAGE ######################
let error_conexion_storage = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= bin($__timeFrom, 1m) and TimeGenerated < bin($__timeTo, 1m)
    | where Log_s contains "[ERROR] Conection error with storage data"
    | count
);

// ####################### CANTIDAD DE ERRORES EN ALARMAS ######################
let cantidad_errores_alarmas = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ($__timeTo - 1d)
    | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07'
    | project TimeGenerated, ContainerJobName_s, Log_s
    | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
    | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
    | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
    | where log_nivel == "ERROR" and log_capa == "domain-alarm"
    | extend dia_ocurrencia = startofday(fecha_log_UTC) 
    | count);

// Calculamos cuántas veces ha fallado el Job 17 en el periodo actual
let checkConsecutividadJob17 = toscalar(
    statusFuentes
    | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile asc 
    | serialize 
    | extend fallo_actual = iff(tostring(job17_nrt_dispatch) startswith "a", 1, 0)
    | extend fallo_previo = prev(fallo_actual, 1)
    | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc // Miramos lo más reciente
    | take 1 // Tomamos la última foto
    | project AlertaReciente = (fallo_actual == 1 and fallo_previo == 1)
);
// ######################## JOIN RESULT #################################
(statusFuentes | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1)
   | join kind=fullouter (statusKpisAlarms | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
    | join kind=fullouter (
        ultima_y_nrt
        | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc 
        | take 1
        | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
  | join kind=fullouter (detalle_kpis_sin_datos | order by fecha_log_UTC desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
//  | join kind=fullouter (detalle_alarmas_con_errores | order by fecha_log_UTC desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
  | summarize 
      ["Settings"] = iff(any(["job01_settings"] startswith "a" or ["job02_settings"] startswith "a"), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Meteo"] = iff(any(["job01_meteo"] startswith "a" or ["job02_meteo"] startswith "a" or ["meteodata"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["PI"] = iff(any(["job01_pisystem"] startswith "a" or ["job02_pisystem"] startswith "a" or ["pisystem_interpolated"] or ["pisystem_recorded"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Plans"] = iff(
          any(["job01_plans"] startswith "a")
          or any(["plan_diario"] == true)
          or any(["planes_mensuales"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_AXB"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG"] == true)
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_AXB"] == true)
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_CH"] == true)  //EStos producen que aparezca en rojo el panel resumen
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_BOTADERO"] == true)  //Estos producen que aparezca en rojo el panel resumen
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_EXTRACCION_MINA"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU"] == true)
      , "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["NRT Dispatch"] = iff(
          // 1. Si hay desactualización de datos (cualquiera en true)
          any(["StdShiftLoads2"] == true) or 
          any(["stdshiftdumpsnodicavel"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftDumps"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftLoads"] == true) or 
          any(["tiempos_mlp"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftState"] == true) or 
          any(["ShiftInfo"] == true) or 
          any(["SHIFTShiftLoad"] == true) or 
          any(["StdGrade"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftdumps"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftloads"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftloads2"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftstate"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_tiempos"] == true) 
          
            // 2. O si el Job 17 tiene al menos sus últimas 2 ejecuciones fallidas
          or checkConsecutividadJob17 == true,
          
          "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Drillit"] = iff(any(["ADF_drillit_ingestion"] startswith "a" or ["drillit_drill_state_history"] or ["drillit_drillings"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Blockgrade"] = iff(any(["ADF_blockgrade_ingestion"] startswith "a" or ["blockgrade_bybucket"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["KPIs"] = iff(any(["job01_transporte_fluidos"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job02_indicadores_generales"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job03_indicadores_globales"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job04_stock_chacay"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job05_servicios_mina"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job08_chancado"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job09_carguio"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job10_flotacion"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job11_molienda"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job12_puerto"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job13_transporte"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job14_desaladora"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["Count No esperados"]) > 0,
                    "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      //["Alertar Alarmas"] = iff(any(["job06_alarms-operational-parameters"] startswith "a") or any(["job07_alarms-service"] startswith "a" or strlen(nombre_alarma) > 0), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
["Alarmas"] = iff(
          any(["job06_alarms-operational-parameters"] startswith "a") or 
          any(["job07_alarms-service"] startswith "a") or 
          incidentes_largos_alarmas > 0 or 
          error_conexion_storage > 0, 
          "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
["Front"] = iff(toscalar((AlertarFront() | count)) > 2, "Alertar", "No Alertar")

  Dispatch   = iff(['Alertar NRT Dispatch']  == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  PI         = iff(['Alertar PI']        == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Drillit    = iff(['Alertar Drillit']   == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Blockgrade = iff(['Alertar Blockgrade']== "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Plans      = iff(['Alertar Plans']     == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  KPIs       = iff(['Alertar KPIs']      == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Alarmas    = iff(['Alertar Alarmas']   == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Front      = iff(['Alertar Front']     == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK")
| extend mapa =
  strcat(
    "Dispatch:",   Dispatch,   ";",
    "PI:",         PI,         ";",
    "Drillit:",    Drillit,    ";",
    "Blockgrade:", Blockgrade, ";",
    "Plans:",      Plans
  )

| extend status = extract(@"(ALERT)", 1, mapa)
| extend color = case(
    status == "ALERT", "#f7f304ff",
    status == "Warn" or status == "WARN", "#FFF4CC",
    "#EAF4EA"
)
// IMPORTANTÍSIMO: quita comillas/espacios/saltos E53935 
| extend color = trim(' "\t\r\n', tostring(color))
// Entrega un único valor
| project color
| take 1

let statusFuentes = view() {
    let startQuery = bin($__timeFrom, 1m);
    let endQuery = bin($__timeTo, 1m);
    let mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01": "job01_meteo",
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02": "job02_meteo",
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01": "job01_pisystem",
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job02": "job02_pisystem",
            "mlp-prd-caj-plans-job01": "job01_plans",
            "DISPATCH": "ADF_dispatch_ingestion",
            "DRILLIT": "ADF_drillit_ingestion",
            "BLOCKGRADE": "ADF_blockgrade_ingestion",
            "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17": "job17_nrt_dispatch",
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job01": "job01_settings",
            "mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job02": "job02_settings"
        });
    let mapUmbralAlerta = dynamic(
        {
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01": 35,
            "mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02": 35,
            "mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01": 25,

        });
    let umbralDataset =
        range dummy from 1 to 1 step 1
        | extend values = mapUmbralAlerta
        | mv-expand values
        | extend value = todouble(replace_string(tostring(split(values, ":")[1]), "}", ""))
        | sort by value desc
        | project value

        | extend ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) % 15 == 0, 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-meteo-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 16, 31, 46), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job01"] = 1,
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-pisystem-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 11, 21, 31, 41, 51), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-plans-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) == 46 and datetime_part("hour", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0,1,6,13,17,18,19),1, 0),
                ["expected_DISPATCH"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (6, 16, 26, 36, 46, 56), 1, 0),
                ["expected_DRILLIT"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (1, 11, 21, 31, 41, 51), 1, 0),
                ["expected_BLOCKGRADE"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (2,32), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) % 2 == 0, 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job01"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (0), 1, 0),
                ["expected_mlp-prd-caj-prfci-job02"] = iff(datetime_part("minute", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) == 0 and datetime_part("hour", TimeGeneratedBin_Chile) in (12,18), 1, 0)
        | project TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, allValues=pack_all()
        | mv-expand allValues
        | extend nombreEsperado = tostring(bag_keys(allValues)[0])
        | extend valorEsperado = toint(allValues[nombreEsperado])
        | project-away allValues
        | where nombreEsperado startswith "expected_"
    };
    let bins_real_data = view() {
        let Filtered_ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL = view() { 
            ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
            | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery and JobName_s startswith "mlp-prd-"
            | where Log_s contains "has successfully completed"// or Log_s contains "has exited with status Failed"
            | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal = JobName_s, valorReal = 1
        };
    let Filtered_PipelineRuns = view() {
    AzureDiagnostics
        | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery
        | where Category == "PipelineRuns" 
        | where OperationName in ("PL_FULL - Succeeded", "PL_BLOCKGRADE - Succeeded")
        | extend nombreReal = iff(ResourceGroup == "MLP-PRD-RG-BLKGRDE", "BLOCKGRADE", replace_string(ResourceGroup, "MLP-PRD-RG-", ""))
        | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal, valorReal = 1
    };
     let Filtered_Job17_Realtime = view() {
        ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= startQuery - totimespan(maxUmbral * 60s) and TimeGenerated < endQuery
        | where JobName_s == "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17"
        | where Log_s contains "has successfully completed"
        | project TimeGenerated, nombreReal = "mlp-prd-caj-ada-job17", valorReal = 1
    };
        let bins_union_data = view() { 
            union Filtered_ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL, Filtered_PipelineRuns
            | summarize valorReal = sum(valorReal) by nombreReal, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile = bin(TimeGenerated, totimespan(1 * 60s))
            | project nombreReal, valorReal, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile
            | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile asc
            | extend nombreEsperado=strcat("expected_", nombreReal)
        };
        bins_union_data
    };
    let join_std_data = view() { 
        bins_expected_logs
        | join kind=leftouter (bins_real_data) on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreEsperado
        | project-away TimeGeneratedBin_Chile1, nombreEsperado1
        | extend nombreReal = replace_string(nombreEsperado, "expected_", "")
        | extend valorReal = coalesce(valorReal, 0)
    };
    join_std_data
    };
    let valoresAcumulados = view() {
        get_container_sources_data
            | extend ["umbralAlerta"] = mapUmbralAlerta[nombreReal]
            | extend range = range(TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, TimeGeneratedBin_Chile + totimespan(todouble(umbralAlerta) * 60s), 1m)
            | mv-expand range to typeof(datetime)
            | summarize ["valorAccReal"]=sum(["valorReal"]),
                        ["valorAccEsperado"]=sum(["valorEsperado"])
                        by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile=range, ["nombreReal"]
            | where TimeGeneratedBin_Chile < endQuery
            | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc
            | extend ["status"] = iff(["valorAccReal"] == 0 and ["valorAccEsperado"] != 0, "a", "-")
    };
    let result = view() { 
        get_container_sources_data
            | join kind=leftouter valoresAcumulados on TimeGeneratedBin_Chile, nombreReal
            | summarize ["status"]=iff(countif(["status"] == "a") > 0, "a", "-"),
                        ["valorReal"] = sum(["valorReal"]),

        | extend tabla = extract(@"Diff sql query\s+([\w\.]+):", 1, Log_s)

        | extend segundos = extract(@"Diff sql query\s+[\w\.]+:\s+([0-9\.]+)\s+seconds", 1, Log_s)

// ######################## Obtencion KPIs sin datos #################################
let get_detalle_kpis_sin_datos = (inicioFecha: datetime, finFecha: datetime)
{
    // Variables
    let CurrentTimeChile = datetime_utc_to_local(now(), 'America/Santiago');
    let CurrentTimeChileWeekDay = dayofweek(CurrentTimeChile) / 1d;
    let CurrentTimeChileHour = datetime_part("hour", CurrentTimeChile);
    let CurrentTimeChileMinute = datetime_part("minute", CurrentTimeChile);
    // 
    // Condiciones KPIs sin datos
    // KPIs que se espera que siempre esten sin datos
    let condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes = True;
    // KPIS sin datos de 7.00 a 10.00
    let condicion_2_0700_a_1000 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 7 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;
    // KPIS sin datos de 19.00 a 21.00
    let condicion_3_1900_a_2100 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 21;
    // KPIS sin datos de miercoles 19.00 a viernes 9.00 horas
    let condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100 = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 3 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19)
                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4)
                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 9);
    // Kpis Sin datos fuera de horario laboral
    let condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 6 or CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 7)
                                            or (CurrentTimeChileHour < 9)
                                            or (CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19);
    // Kpis Sin datos de jueves 21.00 a viernes 10.30 horas
    let condicion_6_jueves_2100_a_viernes_1030 = (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21)
                                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour <= 8)
                                                    or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour == 8 and CurrentTimeChileMinute < 30);

    // Kpis sin datos 9am:
    let condicion_7_0900_a_0930 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 9 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;

    // Kpis sin datos 9pm:
    let condicion_8_2100_a_2130 = CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 22;

    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= inicioFecha and TimeGenerated < finFecha
        | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job' and not(ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07')
        | project TimeGenerated, ContainerJobName_s, Log_s
        | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
        | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
        | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
        | where log_nivel == "ERROR"
        | extend root_error_line = tostring(split(traceback, "\n")[3])
        | extend kpi_name = replace_string(extract(", in (.+)$", 1, root_error_line), "get_", "")
         // Se filtran los nombres de los kpis que es esperado que esten sin datos.
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = tostring(["kpi_name"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_7_0900_a_0930, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in ("numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal","numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal","numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal","numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal","numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal","numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"),  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_8_2100_a_2130, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in ("numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal","numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal","numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal","numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal","numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal","numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"),  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "last_record_dispatch",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "alimentacion_chancado_plan",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "make_up_plan",  "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "tph_transporte_plan", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        //| extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "metros_perforados_plan_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_real_acc_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "mo_fino_producido_real_acc_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "mo_fino_producido_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_producido_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_proy_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_3_1900_a_2100, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "ton_stockpile_proyeccion", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "rendimiento_perforacion_plan_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "metros_perforados_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "numero_perforadoras_operando_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "numero_perforadoras_disponible_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral, iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == "rendimiento_perforacion_real_dia", "", ["KPIs No esperados"]), ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == " ", "", ["KPIs No esperados"])
        | where ["KPIs No esperados"] != ""
        | extend minutos_desde_error = round(datetime_diff('second', $__timeTo(), fecha_log_UTC) / 60.0, 2)
        | order by minutos_desde_error asc
        | summarize ["KPIs sin datos"] = make_set(kpi_name), ["KPIs No esperados"] = make_set(["KPIs No esperados"]), ["Count No esperados"] = dcount(["KPIs No esperados"]) by bin(fecha_log_UTC, 5m)
        | extend MinutosPasados = round(datetime_diff('second', $__timeTo(), fecha_log_UTC) / 60.0, 0)
        | project fecha_log_UTC, MinutosPasados, ["Count No esperados"], ["KPIs No esperados"], ["KPIs sin datos"]
        | order by fecha_log_UTC desc

};
let detalle_kpis_sin_datos = get_detalle_kpis_sin_datos(inicioFecha=$__timeTo - totimespan(10 * 60s), finFecha=$__timeTo);

// ######################## Alertas conocidas Front #################################
let AlertarFront = view() {
    AppServiceConsoleLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= $__timeTo - totimespan(10 * 60s) and TimeGenerated < $__timeTo
    | where Level == "Error" and ResultDescription contains "/usr/src/app/app/" or (ResultDescription contains "Invalid access token")
    | project TimeGenerated, Level, ResultDescription
    | order by TimeGenerated desc
};

let incidentes_largos_alarmas = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1d)
    | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07'
    | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
    | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
    | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
    | where log_nivel == "ERROR" and log_capa == "domain-alarm"
    | extend fecha_log_UTC = todatetime(fecha_log_UTC)
    | sort by nombre_alarma asc, fecha_log_UTC asc
    | serialize 
    | extend prev_fecha = prev(fecha_log_UTC), prev_nombre = prev(nombre_alarma)
    | extend diferencia_segundos = iif(nombre_alarma == prev_nombre, datetime_diff('second', fecha_log_UTC, prev_fecha), 9999)
    | extend nuevo_bloque = iif(diferencia_segundos > 300, 1, 0) 
    | extend id_bloque = row_cumsum(nuevo_bloque)
    | summarize fin_incidente = max(fecha_log_UTC), inicio_incidente = min(fecha_log_UTC) by nombre_alarma, id_bloque
    | extend duracion_minutos = datetime_diff('minute', fin_incidente, inicio_incidente)
    | where duracion_minutos >= 60
    | count
);


// ######################## DETECCIÓN ERROR CONEXIÓN STORAGE ######################
let error_conexion_storage = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= bin($__timeFrom, 1m) and TimeGenerated < bin($__timeTo, 1m)
    | where Log_s contains "[ERROR] Conection error with storage data"
    | count
);

// ####################### CANTIDAD DE ERRORES EN ALARMAS ######################
let cantidad_errores_alarmas = toscalar(
    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ($__timeTo - 1d)
    | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07'
    | project TimeGenerated, ContainerJobName_s, Log_s
    | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
    | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
    | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
    | where log_nivel == "ERROR" and log_capa == "domain-alarm"
    | extend dia_ocurrencia = startofday(fecha_log_UTC) 
    | count);

// Calculamos cuántas veces ha fallado el Job 17 en el periodo actual
let checkConsecutividadJob17 = toscalar(
    statusFuentes
    | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile asc 
    | serialize 
    | extend fallo_actual = iff(tostring(job17_nrt_dispatch) startswith "a", 1, 0)
    | extend fallo_previo = prev(fallo_actual, 1)
    | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc // Miramos lo más reciente
    | take 1 // Tomamos la última foto
    | project AlertaReciente = (fallo_actual == 1 and fallo_previo == 1)
);
// ######################## JOIN RESULT #################################
(statusFuentes | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1)
   | join kind=fullouter (statusKpisAlarms | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
    | join kind=fullouter (
        ultima_y_nrt
        | order by TimeGeneratedBin_Chile desc 
        | take 1
        | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
  | join kind=fullouter (detalle_kpis_sin_datos | order by fecha_log_UTC desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
//  | join kind=fullouter (detalle_alarmas_con_errores | order by fecha_log_UTC desc | take 1 | extend JoinKey = 1) on JoinKey
  | summarize 
      ["Settings"] = iff(any(["job01_settings"] startswith "a" or ["job02_settings"] startswith "a"), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Meteo"] = iff(any(["job01_meteo"] startswith "a" or ["job02_meteo"] startswith "a" or ["meteodata"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["PI"] = iff(any(["job01_pisystem"] startswith "a" or ["job02_pisystem"] startswith "a" or ["pisystem_interpolated"] or ["pisystem_recorded"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Plans"] = iff(
          any(["job01_plans"] startswith "a")
          or any(["plan_diario"] == true)
          or any(["planes_mensuales"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_AXB"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_semanales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_TRANSPORTADO_STMG"] == true)
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_AXB"] == true)
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_CH"] == true)  //EStos producen que aparezca en rojo el panel resumen
          //or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_REMANEJO_A_BOTADERO"] == true)  //Estos producen que aparezca en rojo el panel resumen
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_CONCENTRADO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_LEY_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_LEY_CONCENTRADO_CU"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PUERTO_CU_FINO_FILTRADO_PAGABLE"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_TRATAMIENTO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_EXTRACCION_MINA"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_CU_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_MO_FINO_PRODUCIDO"] == true)
          or any(["planes_acc_mensuales_PLANTA_CONCENTRADORA_RECUPERACION_CU"] == true)
      , "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["NRT Dispatch"] = iff(
          // 1. Si hay desactualización de datos (cualquiera en true)
          any(["StdShiftLoads2"] == true) or 
          any(["stdshiftdumpsnodicavel"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftDumps"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftLoads"] == true) or 
          any(["tiempos_mlp"] == true) or 
          any(["StdShiftState"] == true) or 
          any(["ShiftInfo"] == true) or 
          any(["SHIFTShiftLoad"] == true) or 
          any(["StdGrade"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftdumps"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftloads"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftloads2"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_shiftstate"] == true) or 
          any(["dispatch_tiempos"] == true) 
          
            // 2. O si el Job 17 tiene al menos sus últimas 2 ejecuciones fallidas
          or checkConsecutividadJob17 == true,
          
          "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Drillit"] = iff(any(["ADF_drillit_ingestion"] startswith "a" or ["drillit_drill_state_history"] or ["drillit_drillings"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["Blockgrade"] = iff(any(["ADF_blockgrade_ingestion"] startswith "a" or ["blockgrade_bybucket"]), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      ["KPIs"] = iff(any(["job01_transporte_fluidos"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job02_indicadores_generales"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job03_indicadores_globales"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job04_stock_chacay"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job05_servicios_mina"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job08_chancado"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job09_carguio"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job10_flotacion"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job11_molienda"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job12_puerto"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job13_transporte"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["job14_desaladora"] startswith "a")
                                  or any(["Count No esperados"]) > 0,
                    "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
      //["Alertar Alarmas"] = iff(any(["job06_alarms-operational-parameters"] startswith "a") or any(["job07_alarms-service"] startswith "a" or strlen(nombre_alarma) > 0), "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
["Alarmas"] = iff(
          any(["job06_alarms-operational-parameters"] startswith "a") or 
          any(["job07_alarms-service"] startswith "a") or 
          incidentes_largos_alarmas > 0 or 
          error_conexion_storage > 0, 
          "Alertar", "No Alertar"),
["Front"] = iff(toscalar((AlertarFront() | count)) > 2, "Alertar", "No Alertar")
| project
  Dispatch   = iff(['Alertar NRT Dispatch']  == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  PI         = iff(['Alertar PI']        == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Drillit    = iff(['Alertar Drillit']   == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Blockgrade = iff(['Alertar Blockgrade']== "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Plans      = iff(['Alertar Plans']     == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  KPIs       = iff(['Alertar KPIs']      == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Alarmas    = iff(['Alertar Alarmas']   == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK"),
  Front      = iff(['Alertar Front']     == "Alertar", "ALERT", "OK")
| extend mapa =
  strcat(
    "Dispatch:",   Dispatch,   ";",
    "PI:",         PI,         ";",
    "Drillit:",    Drillit,    ";",
    "Blockgrade:", Blockgrade, ";",
    "Plans:",      Plans,      ";",
    "KPIs:",       KPIs,       ";",
    "Alarmas:",    Alarmas,    ";",
    "Front:",      Front
  )
| extend status = extract(@"(ALERT)", 1, mapa)
| extend color = case(
    status == "ALERT", "#E53935",
    status == "Warn" or status == "WARN", "#FFF4CC",
    "#EAF4EA"
)
// IMPORTANTÍSIMO: quita comillas/espacios/saltos
| extend color = trim(' "\t\r\n', tostring(color))
// Entrega un único valor
| project color
| take 1

// ================= DETECCIÓN MANTENCIÓN CHANCADORES =================
let estado_chancadores =
    Logs_MLP_ADA_CL
    | where product_origin == "DISPATCH_CONDICION_OPERACIONAL"
    | sort by TimeGenerated desc
    | take 1
    | extend
        CH1 = tostring(detail["CH-1"]),
        CH2 = tostring(detail["CH-02"])
    | extend en_mantencion =
        iff(
            trim(" ", tolower(CH1)) == "mant prog"
            or trim(" ", tolower(CH2)) == "mant prog",
            true,
            false
        )
    | project en_mantencion;


// ================= OBTENCION KPIS SIN DATOS =================
let get_detalle_kpis_sin_datos = (inicioFecha: datetime, finFecha: datetime)
{
    // ================= VARIABLES TIEMPO =================
    let CurrentTimeChile = datetime_utc_to_local(now(), 'America/Santiago');
    let CurrentTimeChileWeekDay = dayofweek(CurrentTimeChile) / 1d;
    let CurrentTimeChileHour = datetime_part("hour", CurrentTimeChile);
    let CurrentTimeChileMinute = datetime_part("minute", CurrentTimeChile);

    let en_mantencion = toscalar(estado_chancadores | project en_mantencion);

    // ================= CONDICIONES ORIGINALES =================
    let condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes = True;

    let condicion_2_0700_a_1000 =
        CurrentTimeChileHour >= 7 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;

    let condicion_3_1900_a_2100 =
        CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 21;

    let condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100 =
        (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 3 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19)
        or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4)
        or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 9);

    let condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral =
        (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 6 or CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 7)
        or (CurrentTimeChileHour < 9)
        or (CurrentTimeChileHour >= 19);

    let condicion_6_jueves_2100_a_viernes_1030 =
        (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 4 and CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21)
        or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5 and CurrentTimeChileHour <= 8)
        or (CurrentTimeChileWeekDay == 5
            and CurrentTimeChileHour == 8
            and CurrentTimeChileMinute < 30);

    let condicion_7_0900_a_0930 =
        CurrentTimeChileHour >= 9 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 10;

    let condicion_8_2100_a_2130 =
        CurrentTimeChileHour >= 21 and CurrentTimeChileHour < 22;


    // KPIs chancado
    let kpis_chancado = dynamic([
        "ley_cu_bg_chancado_real",
        "transporte_stmg_mean",
        "transporte_stmg_std",
        "transporte_stmg_ls",
        "transporte_stmg_li",
        "alimentacion_chancado_std",
        "aliemntacion_chancado_ls",
        "alimentacion_chancado_li"
    ]);


    ContainerAppConsoleLogs_CL
        | where TimeGenerated >= inicioFecha and TimeGenerated < finFecha
        | where ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job'
          and not(ContainerJobName_s startswith 'mlp-prd-caj-ada-job07')
        | project TimeGenerated, ContainerJobName_s, Log_s
        | where Log_s startswith '{"fecha_log_UTC":'
        | extend ParsedJson = parse_json(Log_s)
        | evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedJson)
        | where log_nivel == "ERROR"
        | extend root_error_line = tostring(split(traceback, "\n")[3])
        | extend kpi_name =
            replace_string(
                extract(", in (.+)$", 1, root_error_line),
                "get_",
                ""
            )

        // ================= FILTROS ORIGINALES =================
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] = tostring(kpi_name)

        // ---- condicion 7
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_7_0900_a_0930,
                iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal",
                    "numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal",
                    "numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal",
                    "numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal",
                    "numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal",
                    "numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"
                ), "", ["KPIs No esperados"]),
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 8
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_8_2100_a_2130,
                iff(["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "numero_wheeldozers_operando_real","numero_wheeldozers_disponible_real","numero_wheeldozers_nominal",
                    "numero_excavadora_operando_real","numero_excavadora_disponible_real","numero_excavadora_nominal",
                    "numero_aljibes_operando_real","numero_aljibes_disponible_real","numero_aljibes_nominal",
                    "numero_motoniveladora_operando_real","numero_motoniveladora_disponible_real","numero_motoniveladora_nominal",
                    "numero_bulldozer_operando_real","numero_bulldozer_disponible_real","numero_bulldozer_nominal",
                    "numero_cargador_frontal_operando_real","numero_cargador_frontal_disponible_real","numero_cargador_frontal_nominal"
                ), "", ["KPIs No esperados"]),
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 1
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_1_SinDatosPermanentes
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "last_record_dispatch",
                    "alimentacion_chancado_plan",
                    "make_up_plan",
                    "tph_transporte_plan",
                    "metros_perforados_plan_dia"
                ),
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 2
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_2_0700_a_1000
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_real_acc_dia",
                    "mo_fino_producido_real_acc_dia",
                    "mo_fino_producido_proy_dia",
                    "cu_fino_producido_proy_dia",
                    "cu_fino_filtrado_pagable_proy_dia"
                ),
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 3
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_3_1900_a_2100
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] == "ton_stockpile_proyeccion",
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 4
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_4_miercoles_1900_a_viernes_2100
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] == "rendimiento_perforacion_plan_dia",
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 5
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_5_fuera_horario_laboral
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "metros_perforados_real_dia",
                    "numero_perforadoras_operando_real_dia",
                    "numero_perforadoras_disponible_real_dia",
                    "rendimiento_perforacion_real_dia"
                ),
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- condicion 6
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(condicion_6_jueves_2100_a_viernes_1030
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] in (
                    "rendimiento_sag_1_plan","concentrado_colectivo_plan",
                    "ley_concentrado_plan","ley_cu_plan",
                    "ley_concentrado_mo_plan","recuperacion_selectiva_mo_plan",
                    "produccion_selectiva_mo_plan",
                    "rendimiento_sag_2_plan","rendimiento_sag_3_plan"
                ),
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"])

        // ---- MANTENCIÓN CHANCADO
        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(
                en_mantencion == true
                and ["KPIs No esperados"] in (kpis_chancado),
                "",
                ["KPIs No esperados"]
            )

        | extend ["KPIs No esperados"] =
            iff(["KPIs No esperados"] == " ", "", ["KPIs No esperados"])

        | where ["KPIs No esperados"] != ""

        // ================= AGRUPAR =================
        | summarize
            inicio_problema = min(fecha_log_UTC),
            ultimo_error    = max(fecha_log_UTC)
          by kpi_name

        // ================= TIEMPOS =================
        | extend minutos_sin_datos =
            round(datetime_diff("second", now(), inicio_problema) / 60.0, 1)

        | extend minutos_desde_ultimo_error =
            round(datetime_diff("second", now(), ultimo_error) / 60.0, 1)

        | extend sigue_caido =
            minutos_desde_ultimo_error <= 3

        // ================= UMBRAL =================
        | extend umbral =
            iff(kpi_name == "identify_problematic_zone", 30, 20)

        // ================= ALERTA FINAL =================
        | extend Alertar =
            minutos_sin_datos > umbral
            and sigue_caido == true

        | project
            kpi_name,
            inicio_problema,
            ultimo_error,
            minutos_sin_datos,
            umbral,
            Alertar
};

)
| summarize HayAlerta = any(Alertar == true)
| extend status = iff(HayAlerta, "ALERT", "OK")

let statusFuentes = view() {
    let startQuery = bin($__timeFrom, 1m);
    let endQuery = bin($__timeTo, 1m);
    let mapContainerJobs_MLP_ADA_Refactor = dynamic(
        {
